cards.title: Forager Brood Cookbook [1]
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques left by the non-human forager brood.
Shared out of kindness toward Moore and his kin.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Cookbook [2]
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques left by a warrior who challenged the vile dragon Bayle, only to be grievously injured and broken by fear.
Contains details on how a mere mortal can fell a mighty dragon.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Finger-Weaver's Cookbook [2]
cards.description: A record of crafting techniques left by a determined student of the finger ruins. His brush with the sublime all but shattered his mind, though he was left capable enough to leave these few precious words.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Greater Potentate's Cookbook [1]
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques of the greater potentate who roamed lands near and far.
Haunted by the grotesque practice of his village of birth, he stuffed great pots with all manner of things.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ancient Dragon Knight's Cookbook [1]

cards.title: Mad Craftsman's Cookbook [1]

cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: St. Trina Disciple's Cookbook [1]
cards.description: A record of crafting techniques left by a disciple who pursued the teachings of the saint of sleep—yet what seemed a gentle sleep at first ripened into velvet.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Fire Knight's Cookbook [1]
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques left by the Fire Knights, who served Messmer the Impaler.
Details the art of wielding fire for the benefit of soldiers setting out to join the crusade.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ancient Dragon Knight's Cookbook [2]
cards.description: A record of crafting techniques of the ancient dragon knight who followed Godwyn's golden knights into the realm of shadow.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Loyal Knight's Cookbook
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques of the Royal Carian Knights.
Details the arts of the old enchanted knights.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Battlefield Priest's Cookbook [1]
cards.description: A record of crafting techniques left by the devout battlefield priests. These keepers of the faith fought bitterly to spread their gospel in the realm of shadow, where there was no Erdtree to gaze upon.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon's Cookbook [1]

cards.title: Forager Brood Cookbook [7]

Shared out of kindness toward their savior, whose name was unknown.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: St. Trina Disciple's Cookbook [3]

cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Grave Keeper's Cookbook [2]
cards.description: A record of crafting techniques of the grave keepers who watch over those who rest in the realm of shadow.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Antiquity Scholar's Cookbook [2]
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques left by the hornsent academics who studied the ancient ruins of Rauh.
Details techniques for working with sprites thought lost to antiquity.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Tibia's Cookbook
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques of the mariners, the oldest of grave keepers.
Details an ancient means of summoning the dead.
